entries.strategy: Value — initiated position at attractive valuation
entries.thesis: Fenix trading at 3.5x EV/EBITDA with 9% dividend yield. Strong cash generation, net cash balance sheet, and low-cost iron ore production provide downside protection. Iron ore prices supported by supply constraints.
Price pulled back from highs on broader market weakness. Fundamentals unchanged. Increased position size.
Q2 results showed record production and lower costs. Dividend declared. Upgraded by Macquarie. Added on strength.
entries.notes: Average cost now $0.415. Full position size achieved.

entries.thesis: Diversified commodities exposure with strong balance sheet and growing copper exposure. Dividend yield attractive.

entries.strategy: Core holding — iron ore pure play
entries.thesis: Low-cost iron ore producer with strong balance sheet and Oyu Tolgoi copper growth optionality.
entries.notes: Exited on valuation grounds. Iron ore prices near cycle highs.

entries.strategy: Core holding — iron ore + green hydrogen
entries.thesis: FMG diversified into green hydrogen/energy while maintaining strong iron ore cash flows. Attractive yield.
